message:
chore(deps): Add criterion benchmarking and expand dev dependencies

Add criterion with async_tokio feature for performance benchmarking
across the crate workspace. This enables comprehensive benchmarking of
critical paths including pattern detection, delta extraction, and FTS
query performance.

Changes:
- Add criterion 0.5 to workspace Cargo.toml with async_tokio feature
- Add base64 0.22.1 to wa-core for UserVarPayload decoding
- Add criterion 0.5 to wa-core dev-dependencies
- Add fancy-regex to wa crate for regex-based wait-for patterns
- Configure three benchmark targets: pattern_detection, delta_extraction,
  fts_query (all with harness = false for custom benches)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+base64 = "0.22.1"

+
+# Benchmarks
+[[bench]]
+name = "pattern_detection"

+
+[[bench]]

+
